executives.name: Neal Froneman
executives.background: Neal Froneman was appointed executive director and CEO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Sibanye-Stillwater, he was CEO of Gold One International Limited and Aflease Gold Limited.

executives.name: Charl Keyter
executives.background: Charl Keyter was appointed executive director and CFO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry and previously held various senior financial roles at Gold Fields Limited.

executives.name: Richard Stewart
executives.background: Richard Stewart was appointed Chief Operating Officer on 1 December 2020. He joined the Group in 2014 and has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Themba Nkosi
executives.background: Themba Nkosi is the Chief Sustainability Officer. He joined Sibanye-Stillwater in 2016 and has extensive experience in human resources and corporate affairs.

board_of_directors.name: Vincent Maphai
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Vincent Maphai was appointed as Chairman and non-executive director on 1 June 2019. He has a distinguished career in academia and the private sector, including roles at BHP Billiton South Africa and South African Breweries.

board_of_directors.name: Timothy Cumming
board_of_directors.background: Timothy Cumming was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 21 February 2013. He has over 40 years of experience in mining and financial services.

board_of_directors.name: Savannah Danson
board_of_directors.background: Savannah Danson was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 23 May 2017. She is the founder and Executive Chairperson of Bunengi Group.

board_of_directors.name: Harry Kenyon-Slaney
board_of_directors.background: Harry Kenyon-Slaney was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 16 January 2019. He has over 37 years of experience in the mining industry, notably with Rio Tinto.

board_of_directors.name: Jeremiah Vilakazi
board_of_directors.background: Jerry Vilakazi was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 1 January 2013. He is the Executive Chairman of Palama Group.

board_of_directors.name: Keith Rayner
board_of_directors.background: Keith Rayner was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 1 January 2013. He is a qualified Chartered Accountant with extensive experience in corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Susan van der Merwe
board_of_directors.background: Susan van der Merwe was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 21 February 2013. She served as a member of Parliament in South Africa for 18 years.

board_of_directors.name: Elaine Dorward-King
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Elaine Dorward-King was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 27 March 2020. She has over 30 years of experience in environmental health and safety.

board_of_directors.name: Sindile Mabaso-Koyana
board_of_directors.background: Sindile Mabaso-Koyana was appointed as an independent non-executive director on 24 February 2021. She is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in finance and governance.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 20-F Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
